task.en: In Reminders, create a single reminder in the default list (the first list shown in the sidebar) with: title `Submit Q3 expense report` (exactly), due date `June 15, 2026` at `9:00 AM`. Do not add any other reminders.

pre_command: RDB="$HOME/Library/Group Containers/group.com.apple.reminders/Container_v1/Stores/Data-local.sqlite"; open -gj -a Reminders 2>/dev/null; sleep 10; osascript -e 'tell application "Reminders" to quit' 2>/dev/null; killall Reminders 2>/dev/null; sleep 3; TCOL=$(sqlite3 "$RDB" "SELECT name FROM pragma_table_info('ZREMCDREMINDER') WHERE name IN ('ZTITLE','ZNAME') LIMIT 1;" 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$TCOL" ] && sqlite3 "$RDB" "DELETE FROM ZREMCDREMINDER WHERE $TCOL='Submit Q3 expense report';" 2>/dev/null; sqlite3 "$RDB" "PRAGMA wal_checkpoint(TRUNCATE);" 2>/dev/null; sleep 1
grading_command: RDB="$HOME/Library/Group Containers/group.com.apple.reminders/Container_v1/Stores/Data-local.sqlite"; killall Reminders 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; TCOL=$(sqlite3 "$RDB" "SELECT name FROM pragma_table_info('ZREMCDREMINDER') WHERE name IN ('ZTITLE','ZNAME') LIMIT 1;" 2>/dev/null); N=$(sqlite3 "$RDB" "SELECT count(*) FROM ZREMCDREMINDER WHERE $TCOL='Submit Q3 expense report' AND (ZMARKEDFORDELETION IS NULL OR ZMARKEDFORDELETION=0);" 2>/dev/null); [ "$N" -ge 1 ] 2>/dev/null && echo True || echo False

RDB="$HOME/Library/Group Containers/group.com.apple.reminders/Container_v1/Stores/Data-local.sqlite"; TCOL=$(sqlite3 "$RDB" "SELECT name FROM pragma_table_info('ZREMCDREMINDER') WHERE name IN ('ZTITLE','ZNAME') LIMIT 1;" 2>/dev/null); D=$(sqlite3 "$RDB" "SELECT date(ZDUEDATE+978307200,'unixepoch','localtime') FROM ZREMCDREMINDER WHERE $TCOL='Submit Q3 expense report' AND ZDUEDATE IS NOT NULL AND (ZMARKEDFORDELETION IS NULL OR ZMARKEDFORDELETION=0) ORDER BY ZDUEDATE DESC LIMIT 1;" 2>/dev/null); [ "$D" = "2026-06-15" ] && echo True || echo False

RDB="$HOME/Library/Group Containers/group.com.apple.reminders/Container_v1/Stores/Data-local.sqlite"; TCOL=$(sqlite3 "$RDB" "SELECT name FROM pragma_table_info('ZREMCDREMINDER') WHERE name IN ('ZTITLE','ZNAME') LIMIT 1;" 2>/dev/null); T=$(sqlite3 "$RDB" "SELECT strftime('%H:%M',ZDUEDATE+978307200,'unixepoch','localtime') FROM ZREMCDREMINDER WHERE $TCOL='Submit Q3 expense report' AND ZDUEDATE IS NOT NULL AND (ZMARKEDFORDELETION IS NULL OR ZMARKEDFORDELETION=0) ORDER BY ZDUEDATE DESC LIMIT 1;" 2>/dev/null); [ "$T" = "09:00" ] && echo True || echo False
